query:
SELECT f.id, f.code, f.name, f.field_type, f.is_required, f.display_order, s.name as section_name
FROM form_section_fields f
JOIN form_sections s ON f.section_id = s.id
WHERE s.code = 'basic_info'
ORDER BY f.display_order;
